# Sprint Plan Template

**Sprint:** Sprint N
**Dates:** YYYY-MM-DD → YYYY-MM-DD
**Sprint Goal:** <One measurable goal>
**Solo PM Availability:** <hours/week>

## Committed Work Orders

| ID | Primary Agent | Goal | Status | Deadline |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| WO-YYYY-NNN | <agent> | <goal> | Ready | <date> |

## WIP Limits

- Max in-progress work orders: 3
- Max PRD/Architecture work orders: 1

## Risks to Watch

- <Risk>

## Definition of Sprint Done

- [ ] Sprint goal achieved or explicitly descoped
- [ ] All completed work orders have artifact contracts
- [ ] RAID updated
- [ ] Review completed
- [ ] Retro completed
